name: kamiyo
description: Agent Identity and Conflict Resolution Protocol for Solana
author: KAMIYO <susumu@kamiyo.ai>

scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/sdk run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/x402-client run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/hive run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agent-paranet run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agent-core run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/daydreams run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/swarm-agents run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/settlement run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agents run build && pnpm --filter kamiyo-companion run build
scripts.build:sdk: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/sdk run build
scripts.build:oracle: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/hive run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/hyperliquid run build && cd services/oracle && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:nika: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agent-paranet run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/settlement run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agents run build && cd services/nika && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf target && cd packages/kamiyo-sdk && rm -rf dist
scripts.build:meishi-compliance: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/sdk run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi-compliance run build
